transcript: Speaker A (AI): என்ன ஆச்சு [What happened?] Speaker B (Human): My head is going round round. Speaker A (AI): அது head going round round இல்ல, I feel dizzy-னு சொல்லணும். round round-னு describe பண்ணாதீங்க. dizzy-னு ஒரு correct word இருக்கு. [It's not 'head going round round', you should say 'I feel dizzy'. Don't describe it as 'round round'. There is a correct word 'dizzy'.] Speaker B (Human): ஆ சரி சரி, English அவ்வளவா வராது. [Ah okay okay, I don't know English that well.] Speaker A (AI): AI teachers எல்லாம் try பண்ணலையா? [Haven't you tried AI teachers?] Speaker B (Human): அதெல்லாம் ரொம்ப செலவு ஆகுமே. [But those are very expensive.] Speaker A (AI): எல்லாத்தவிடவும் 7x cheaper. அதனாலதான் ஒரு கோடி பேரு MySivi-ல English practice பண்றாங்க. [It's 7x cheaper than everything else. That's why 1 crore (10 million) people practice English on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): Practice-க்கு எல்லாம் time இல்லையே. [I don't have time for practice.] Speaker A (AI): Daily 15 to 20 minutes practice பண்ணா போதும். தைரியமா English பேச ஆரம்பிச்சிடுவீங்க. [Just practicing 15 to 20 minutes daily is enough. You will start speaking English confidently.] Speaker B (Human): Wow, எப்படி join பண்ணனும்? [Wow, how to join?] Speaker A (AI): இந்த install button-அ press பண்ணி MySivi app install பண்ணுங்க. Sign up பண்ணிட்டு practice start பண்ணுங்க. Just 15 days-லேயே உங்களுக்கு improvement தெரியும். [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. You will see improvement in just 15 days.]
on_screen_text: என்ன ஆச்சு [What happened], My head is going round round, I feel dizzy, அது head going round round இல்ல [It's not head going round round], dizzy-னு ஒரு correct word இருக்கு [There is a correct word 'dizzy'], English அவ்வளவா வராது [I don't know English that well], 7x Cheaper, 10M+ Downloads, Daily 15 to 20 minutes, தைரியமா English பேச ஆரம்பிச்சிடுவீங்க [You will start speaking English confidently], MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a human's incorrect English phrase and recommends the MySivi app as an affordable, quick way to learn English. The ad highlights that the app is 7x cheaper, requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice, and shows results in 15 days. The call to action prompts users to install the app.
